result.text:
The reality is no singular memecoin is "sustainable"

The majority of people know what they are getting into when they purchase something like this

But imagine a scenario where you didn't have to sell while supporting your favourite memes, artists, developers or whatever pushing their new idea or technology

Imagine a scenario where the team doesn't have to directly sell on you to make money to continue wanting to push every day

Imagine a scenario where a real influencer can setup a token, get their diehard fans involved, continuously work for it over months/years and the entire community can benefit off the combined efforts

All markets are cyclical, whether it's housing, stocks, memes whatever, nobody is denying that

But with the market supporting the right system, everyone can benefit from these new technologies and we could see the biggest spread of wealth because of this, to normal people who actually can believe in something

That's why I continue to bull post $IMG if we as a collective change how the game works, a lot more people can actually win in this game than previously thought about

Just my thoughts on how things are right now and what we can do to make things better
